title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Pekoms, Unknown person #12 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....how- ever, you've brought shame upon my house by suggesting that you wanted to terminate our bonds as a family.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: JINBE... YOUR DEPAR- TURE WOULD CAUSE A HUGE VOID AND COST ME A VALUABLE AND POWERFUL RESOURC...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well, sure...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you "sure" me!!! It's only fair that you lose something valuable as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the only way we could call this a fair trade, wouldn't you agree ?!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Mama Mama MA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Bring in the "roulette"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: HAAA- AAAA.... Hahaaha Haaha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Now then, what exactly will it be...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: night time, in the seas within big mom's territory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Whole cake

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's so sweet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't we just stop here and go to sleep for a while?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you nuts!! What're we gonna do if those ants start attacking us again?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This will start to flow once the warmth of the sun returns during the day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But at night, this area gets quite cold and the sea ends up freezing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would have been nice if you could have mentioned that a bit earlier!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone, our primary focus will be to melt this stuff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we can hightail it out of this sea of "Mizuame"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Roger that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just so we're clear, I've only temporarily put that swarm of ants to sleep!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be chaos if they woke up again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I once had my ship eaten down to the last plank by these ants.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: YIKES!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But what were you doing in a place like this?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pedro used to be a pirate, just like pekoms!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Whaa?! for Real?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I honestly didn't know any better at the time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought I was simply an explorer, but they ended up putting a bounty on my head.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: I only accompanied Pekoms Midway.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm only sharing this with you because of the trust that has been built...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we were on a journey to discover poneglyphs ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We just wanted to be an asset to our master nekomamushi in any way that we could.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The day we finally stepped foot into big mom's territory... would be the last day of our journey.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth is, I've fallen here once before!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is something I have not shared with many...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I had no idea!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this place must bring back those awful memories?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If my experiences here end up riding us in our plan to rescue Sanji, I wouldn't have it any other way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Besides, I doubt that my tagging along...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: will turn out to be a waste of any of our times.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was told our Duke and Master showed you all our "Road PoneGlyph".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yup.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I first heard of this, I could not believe my ears.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Though you all are our Saviors... the last time we showed that to outsiders who weren't members of the Kozuki clan was...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
